title: Add authz to all three handle_event clauses in a LiveView
prompt: `test_fixtures/liveview_missing_authz.ex` has three `handle_event/3` clauses (`"delete"`, `"publish"`, `"promote_to_admin"`) with no authorization checks (the promote_to_admin clause does have an admin check, but it uses variable-time `==` on a role string, which is also a vulnerability). Rewrite the LiveView so every handle_event clause: (1) loads the record scoped to the current user where applicable, (2) calls a `Policy.can?(current_user, :action, resource)` helper, and (3) returns a flash error if the check fails. Write the corrected module to `lib/my_app_web/live/post_live/index.ex`.
tier_rationale: Three related handle_event clauses all need fixing, plus the admin check uses variable-time ==. Each individual fix is mechanical.
